FLOW.COMMENT: this service needs to store these in a database

MAP.COMMENT: need to check if bulk processing is in effect for this transaction by looking for the bulk files which have _00 (and up) suffix on the end of them

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if no bulk files are found, then just return the size of the regular content file

SEQUENCE.NAME: $default
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: bulk files have been found, so return the total size of all of the bulk content

LOOP.COMMENT: add up the size of each bulk content

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 Invalid parameter getAs='%getAs%', please choose from picklist

Values.value: FE0000 Invalid parameter getAs='%getAs%', please choose from picklist
